sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample states that 'Your Risk' is only for the heritable component of the disease, and that environmental, lifestyle, and other non-heritable factors also affect overall susceptibility risk.
sampleRows.description: The sample uses lung cancer as an example, saying lung cancer is only 10% heritable and most cases are associated with lifestyle factors such as smoking.
sampleRows.sourceLabel: Sibling Disease Risk Genetic Test Report sample report
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public Sequencing.com Disease Risk Genetic Test Report sample PDF; used here as sibling output-structure evidence for Prevent Sudden Death, not as a direct Prevent Sudden Death sample report or local inherited cardiovascular and sudden-death output structure, sudden-death risk, cardiomyopathy or arrhythmia diagnosis, inherited cardiovascular disease diagnosis, ECG/echo/rhythm-monitoring inference, symptom inference, exercise clearance, ICD/device need, beta-blocker or medication need, screening, testing, prevention, cascade testing, reproductive action, or actionability guidance.

sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: Visible sample rows include Abdominal Aortic Aneurysm Reduced; Atherosclerosis Typical; Atrial Fibrillation Typical; Cardiovascular Disease Early Onset Very Reduced; COPD Typical; Coronary Artery Disease Typical; Intracranial Aneurysm Elevated; Mitral Valve Prolapse Typical; Myocardial Infarction Reduced; Stroke Elevated; Venous Thromboembolism Typical.
sampleRows.description: The page explains that CAD has a genetic susceptibility component and names KL, NOS3, HSPD1, and CHD13 as example genes used across hundreds of variants.
sampleRows.sourceLabel: Sibling Disease Risk Genetic Test Report sample report
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public Sequencing.com Disease Risk Genetic Test Report sample PDF; used here as sibling output-structure evidence for Prevent Sudden Death, not as a direct Prevent Sudden Death sample report or local inherited cardiovascular and sudden-death output structure, sudden-death risk, cardiomyopathy or arrhythmia diagnosis, inherited cardiovascular disease diagnosis, ECG/echo/rhythm-monitoring inference, symptom inference, exercise clearance, ICD/device need, beta-blocker or medication need, screening, testing, prevention, cascade testing, reproductive action, or actionability guidance.

The report is educational boundary context and does not provide sudden-death risk estimation, inherited cardiovascular diagnosis, cardiomyopathy or arrhythmia diagnosis, ECG/echo/rhythm interpretation, variant classification, carrier-status reporting, inheritance inference, family-member risk estimation, testing advice, screening advice, prevention advice, device advice, medication advice, exercise advice, cascade-testing advice, reproductive advice, or clinical actionability.
